name: PE Fund Quarterly Statement
description: Extracts fund summary and portfolio investment details from Private Equity quarterly statements for Investran upload

fields.name: fund_name
fields.description: The full legal name of the fund (e.g., Horizon Growth Partners Fund IV, L.P.)

fields.name: fund_id
fields.description: The fund identifier code (e.g., HGP-IV, ACP-VII)

fields.name: reporting_period
fields.description: The quarter and year being reported (e.g., Q3 2024)

fields.name: period_end_date
fields.description: The specific end date of the reporting period (e.g., September 30, 2024)

fields.name: total_commitments
fields.description: Total capital commitments to the fund in dollars

fields.name: capital_called
fields.description: Total capital called or drawn down to date in dollars

fields.name: cumulative_distributions
fields.description: Total distributions returned to LPs to date in dollars

fields.name: net_asset_value
fields.description: Current net asset value of the fund in dollars

entity_groups.name: portfolio_investments
entity_groups.description: Extract ALL portfolio company investments from the Schedule of Investments table. Each row represents one portfolio company investment.

fields.name: company_name
fields.description: Name of the portfolio company (e.g., TechFlow Solutions Inc.)

fields.name: industry
fields.description: Industry or sector of the portfolio company (e.g., Enterprise Software, Healthcare IT)

fields.name: cost_basis
fields.description: Original cost basis of the investment in dollars (e.g., $42,000,000)

fields.name: fair_value
fields.description: Current fair value of the investment in dollars (e.g., $68,500,000)
